mentions.note: Linked to AI infrastructure (S1 172); rallied 3 points today; may be starting major move; beneficiary of AI data center buildout.
Makes chips for Google and others; tech semis company; solid diversification holding.
Semiconductor equipment maker; makes chips for Google; diversified tech play.
Infrastructure supplier to OpenAI and hyperscalers; benefits from data center buildout but subject to OpenAI fundraising/market share risk.
Known as 'Dr. Colossus' of semiconductor; acting really badly; part of broader Mag 7 pressure as money rotates to storage plays; watch for reversion.
Down ~$100 from highs; Hock Tan delivers quarter after quarter on software, hardware, Google work expansion. Represents one of the cheaper AI plays with expanding margins.
Like Marvell, sold unfairly as shortage mentality favors memory plays over chip designers; should command higher valuation but market misses the dynamic.
Special-chip supplier caught in irrational market rotation against MRVL and NVDA; great company but unfairly sold due to shortage narrative.
Winner company in current environment but not good time to buy yet. Let it come down further. Will be right eventually but may take time.
Primary beneficiary of Google's massive capex deployment; supplier of critical infrastructure for AI buildout.
$1.5T company makes semis and software; caught in software decline from AI fears; too hard to own in current market despite quality.
Marvell took accelerator chip business; Cramer stuck with Broadcom; announced deals with Google and Anthropic (Project Glasswing); +6% on news; ignore rumors of displacement.

Dominant networking and custom chip player; Meta, Anthropic, Google major customers; trimmed today into strength for portfolio flexibility; deserves higher but need ammo for inevitable pullbacks; take profits 30-40% rallies to fund future buys.
Networking component play in data center buildout; referenced alongside Intel and AMD in semis complex.
Third-highest weighting in CIBR cybersecurity ETF (though primarily semiconductor/networking equipment); love it and owned by charitable trust for ages.
Semiconductor play powering AI revolution; part of hardware cohort displacing software in value creation; benefits from data center and AI compute demand.
Sleeper: makes custom chips for Google, Meta, ByteDance, Anthropic; VMware enterprise software gateway to cloud; CEO Hock Tan's shrewd execution drives gains.
Hit all-time high today; owned for trust but Cramer circumspect given run-up ahead of earnings; good quarter likely but timing risk from profit-taking
Earnings disappointing and trust lost significant capital; possible comeback if insider buying appears.
